resources.string: Are you sure you want to close all active tabs?
%1$s you agree to our %2$s and acknowledge you have read our %3$s.
Warning: Some selected items are synced from a local folder. Proceeding will delete the actual files from your device storage.\n\nThis action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to permanently delete all of your book data from the cloud? This will also wipe your local library to prevent re-syncing. This action cannot be undone.
Select a file to read, or sync a local folder to automatically import books.
Open a file from your library to see it here.
Upload books from your synced folders to Google Drive.
Select a PDF, EPUB, MOBI, or AZW3 file from your device to get started.
All books are already in this shelf
Are you sure you want to delete the \'%1$s\' shelf? All books will be moved to Unshelved.
Are you sure you want to delete the %1$d selected %2$s? All books within will be moved to Unshelved.
Connect local folders to create a live library. Episteme will monitor files and sync progress.
Select the file types you want to sync from this folder:

Do you want to save this external file in the app\'s library? If not, it will be removed.\n\n(You can change this default behavior anytime from the Home Screen > More Options > External File Behavior).
Are you sure you want to delete \'%1$s\'?
Deleting this catalog will also permanently remove %1$d streaming books associated with it from your library.
Listen to your books with built-in TTS
Keep your entire library, including book files and reading progress, synced across up to 4 devices.
Get 10 free summaries of chapters or pages per day
Search phrases and even paragraphs, not just single words
Upgrade currently unavailable. Please check your internet and try again.
Please sign in to your Google account to purchase Episteme Pro.
Please sign in to your Google account to purchase credits.
This may take a few moments. Your Pro status will be updated automatically.
This device already has a Pro purchase, but it\'s linked to a different account. Please sign in to the account that was used for the original purchase to restore your Pro features.
You\'re getting Episteme Pro at a special discounted price during our early access period! This is a limited-time offer.
Please sign in to your Google account to purchase Episteme Pro and unlock all premium features.
Import TTF or OTF files to use them in your books.
Grumpy wizards make toxic brew for the evil queen! 1234567890 ?.,;:
Are you sure you want to delete \'%1$s\'? This will remove it from all your devices if sync is on.
Found a bug, have a feature request, or just want to say hi? Let us know on GitHub or email us.
Report bugs, request features, and track development progress.
Contact us directly via email for any other inquiries.
Sync across devices is a Pro feature. Unlock all pro features with a single, one-time purchase.
Are you sure you want to sign out?
To use Episteme Pro on this device, please remove one of your existing registered devices.
This will permanently delete all your books and reading progress from this device AND from your Google Drive account. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
This will clear all processed pages in pagination mode. This helps fix layout issues but will require books to be re-processed next time you open them.
This will delete all generated \'Text View\' versions of your PDFs and clear their associated images/HTML cache. Your original PDFs will remain untouched.
Exit the reader and return to the home screen
Choose your preferred app for word lookups
Access reading mode, bookmarks, and advanced settings
Drag to jump quickly to any page in the document
Browse chapters and navigate to any section
Adjust font, size, line height, alignment, and custom fonts
Find any word or phrase in this book
Summarize the current chapter or page using AI
Read the book aloud using your device\'s voice engine
Invert PDF colors for dark mode
Disable dark mode and restore the original PDF colors
Lock horizontal panning on the page
Unlock panning to re-enable pinch-to-zoom and drag gestures
Hide all UI controls for an immersive, distraction-free reading view
Visually mark selectable text regions across the current page
Remove the selectable text overlay from the page
Finish editing and return to normal reading view
Exit search and go back to the reader
Erase your current search query and start over
Expand the panel to see all search matches
Jump to the previous search match in the document
Jump to the next search match in the document
Privacy Policy • Terms of Service • Licenses
Your device doesn\'t support folder selection. You can still import files individually.
No file manager found. Please install a file manager app.
An error occurred with the purchase.
Purchase verification failed. Please contact support if you were charged.
This device was removed from your account.
Could not verify this device. Please check your connection.
Failed to update devices. Please try again.
Failed to open file for saving.
Enable sync to clear cloud data.
Not signed in, cannot clear cloud data.
Clearing all cloud and local data…
All cloud and local data cleared successfully.
Error: Failed to clear all data.
Sign in failed. Please try again.
Could not find a Google account. This can happen on a fresh install, please try again in a moment.
An error occurred during sign in. Please check your internet connection.
Please sign in to test device management.
Sync is an Episteme Pro feature.
Failed to load generated text view.
File deleted from folder. Removed from library.
A shelf with that name already exists.
Reflow cache & generated text views cleared.
AI could not provide a definition.
Please stop playback to change settings.
No voices available on this device.
No voices found for this language.
No custom themes yet. Tap \'+\' to create one.
So many books, so little time.
⚠️ Low contrast! This might cause eye strain.
Not enough context for a recap.
Uses AI for definitions. Will fall back to the external app below if offline or if the selected phrase is too long.
Uses the selected app for dictionary lookups.
App used for translating selected text.
Failed to parse summary from server response.
Network error. Please check connection and server status.
Get concise summaries of any chapter with Episteme Pro. Upgrade to start using this feature.
Defining entire phrases and paragraphs up to 2000 characters is a Pro feature. Upgrade to get instant definitions for any selected text.
Select a color for the slot:
You haven\'t added any bookmarks yet.
Are you sure you want to permanently delete this bookmark?
Are you sure you want to permanently delete this highlight?
Error: Book content not found. Path: %1$s
Please select a dictionary app first.
Please select a translate app first.
Please select a search app first.
No chapters available for this book.
To show playback controls while the app is in the background, please grant the notification permission.
Using Justified alignment in Paginated Mode may cause text selection and highlights to be inaccurate due to layout limitations.
Wait for book to load fully.
Control the visibility of the device\'s system bars.
The reading progress and chapter indicator at the bottom of the screen.
Instantly load the next/previous chapter when scrolling past the end, without the pull-to-refresh animation.
Removes the horizontal gap on the left and right edges.
Browse source code, star, fork, and report issues.
Importing %1$d books… They will appear in your Library shortly.

You clicked on an external link:

%1$s

What would you like to do?
No browser found to open the link.
This is how your current voice settings sound.
Select the tools you want to keep visible. Unchecking a tool hides it from the UI to give you a distraction-free reading space.
Failed to import SVG or empty.
Indexing pages… %1$d%% done. Search results will update automatically.
Choose the primary language/script of this document for better text recognition results.
You can change this later in More Options > OCR Language.

You are changing the OCR script to %1$s.

To ensure search accuracy, we need to clear the existing index and re-scan pages that require OCR using this new language.

This will happen in the background.
This document is encrypted. Please enter the password to view it.
You are about to navigate to:\n%1$s
No other PDFs found in your library.
PDF is empty or could not be displayed.
Chapters are not available for this book.
